component.name: Nebula Files
component.summary: Modern file manager with themes and cloud integration

description.p: Nebula Files is a modern, feature-rich file manager built with GTK4 and libadwaita. It offers multiple themes including a Windows 11 Explorer replica, macOS-inspired look, and a clean minimal design.

ul.li: Multiple themes: Nova, macOS, Windows 11, Minimal, Retro (dark and light variants)
Cloud drive integration: OneDrive and Google Drive via rclone
Split view for side-by-side file browsing
Click-to-edit address bar with case-insensitive navigation
File type filters: Images, Documents, Videos, Audio, Code, Archives
Multi-format compression: ZIP, TAR.GZ, TAR.XZ, TAR.BZ2
Enhanced file properties with permission editor
Super Search across home directory and mounted drives
Drag and drop between panes and external apps
This PC drive view with storage bars
Customizable accent colors, fonts, and icon styles

description.p: Initial Flathub release with full feature set including split view, cloud drives, filters, and multi-theme support.

screenshot.caption: Nebula Files with the default Nova theme
